prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX3582R Gen II** turbocharger (compatible with the **CWGD 3.0L V6 TFSI** engine code) with a custom **034 Motorsport** billet compressor wheel and **Precision Turbo** 62mm turbine wheel, paired with a **Forge Motorsport** silicone charge pipe kit and **APR** Stage 3+ ECU/TCU software (targeting 600+ HP on 93 octane with **MethaShot** methanol injection for knock control)

Install a **Wagner Tuning Competition** front-mount intercooler (C8-specific core dimensions: 600x300x80mm) with **VRSF** titanium-coated downpipes and a **Milltek Sport** 3.5-inch cat-back exhaust system featuring **Akrapovič** titanium tips and **REMUS** valvetronic bypass valves for aggressive backpressure tuning

Replace the factory **DL501** 7-speed S tronic transmission with a **034 Motorsport** reinforced clutch pack and **South Bend Clutch** Stage 3 twin-disc setup, paired with a **Neuspeed** limited-slip differential (25% lockup under load) and **AWE Tuning** transmission cooler with integrated **Mocal** oil thermostat for sustained track use
estetica: Install a **Prior Design PD8XX** widebody conversion kit (C8-specific fender flares with carbon fiber construction) paired with a **Rocket Bunny V3** rear diffuser and **Audi Sport** RS7-style front splitter (modified for C8 chassis clearance)

Replace all exterior lighting with **Lux H8 V4** LED headlights (C8-specific adaptive matrix housing), **Dapper Lighting** sequential taillights (OEM+ integration), and **Morimoto** XB LED fog lights with **Hella** yellow-tinted lenses for contrast

Apply a **3M 1080 Matte Graphite Black** full vinyl wrap with **Avery Dennison** carbon fiber accents on the roof, mirror caps, and side skirts, paired with **Vorsteiner** forged carbon fiber side blades and **OEM+** RS6-style rear bumper inserts (modified for C8 exhaust cutouts)
